_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Integrate security requirements into application design elements
reference_document_element_description: Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design, tool integration, retrieval pipeline, output validation, and failure mode documentation.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-002 (SP, cosine: 0.471), SP-K-003 (SP, cosine: 0.465).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.487). Shared vocabulary: [application, design]. NICE-only terms [elements, integrate, requirements, security] vs WIDAI-only terms [based, build, documentation, failure, integration, llm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.883, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Integrate security requirements into application design elements" and "Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.493 ≈ STS 0.487 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [application, design] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [application, design]. NICE-only: [elements, integrate, requirements, security]. WIDAI-only: [based, build, documentation, failure, integration, llm].
